monster.name: OthranVorash
monster.description: Othran is a half-elf with an elegant bearing and a calculating gaze. The elven traits are barely hinted at — slightly pointed ears, sharp features — but his eyes have an unnatural light, a greenish reflection that betrays the pact with Vecna. He dresses in dark, practical clothing, without ostentation. Distinctive trait: he speaks in a low, measured tone, as if every conversation were an interrogation. He has a habit of staring at people in silence before answering — a trick to make them uncomfortable.
